hero.headline: Modern Dental Clinic Management
hero.subheadline: Streamline appointments, manage patients, and grow your practice with our all-in-one dental SaaS platform.

features.title: Everything Your Clinic Needs
features.subtitle: Powerful tools designed for modern dental practices

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.description: Intelligent appointment booking with automated reminders and conflict detection.

patients.title: Patient Management
patients.description: Complete patient profiles, medical history, and treatment records at your fingertips.

billing.title: Billing & Invoicing
billing.description: Automated billing, insurance claims, and payment tracking in one place.

analytics.title: Real-Time Analytics
analytics.description: Data-driven insights to monitor revenue, appointments, and clinic performance.

security.title: Data Security
security.description: HIPAA-compliant data storage with end-to-end encryption and audit logs.

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.description: Automated SMS and email reminders reduce no-shows by up to 60%.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your practice

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for small clinics just getting started.

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: Ideal for growing practices with advanced needs.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For large clinics and multi-branch practices.

branding.description: Welcome back to the DentiFlow Admin Portal. Manage appointments, patients, and clinic operations in one place.
